text:
Controversial design decisions
- Just make edits - don't ask me
- Minimal UI - no VS Code fork
- No "choose your own model"
- No fixed pricing, no token limit
- Unix philosophy over vertical integration
- Don't build on top of a RAG bot - existing code AI UX is now outdated

layout.background: black with subtle dark wave texture
